content:
## Available Transfer Options
Northstar Bank supports four transfer options for customer payment requests. Use the product name exactly as shown when describing the option to a customer.

| Transfer option | Type code | Fee | Per-transfer cap | Delivery business days |
| --- | --- | ---: | ---: | ---: |
| Internal transfer between Northstar accounts | internal | 0 | not specified | 0 |
| Standard ACH transfer | ach_standard | 0 | 25000 | 2 |
| Same-day ACH transfer | ach_same_day | 2 | 100000 | 0 |
| Domestic wire transfer | wire_domestic | 25 | 250000 | 0 |

## Daily Limit Treatment
1. Standard ACH transfer counts toward the external daily limit: True.
2. Same-day ACH transfer counts toward the external daily limit: True.
3. Internal transfer between Northstar accounts counts toward the external daily limit: False.
4. Domestic wire transfer counts toward the external daily limit: False.

The external daily limit is 25000. Apply that limit only to transfer types marked as counting toward it.

## Cutoff Notes
Cutoff times are 20:00 for Standard ACH transfer, 14:00 for Same-day ACH transfer, and 16:00 for Domestic wire transfer. Internal transfer between Northstar accounts has cutoff time not specified. See "Transfer Cutoff And Delivery Policy" for cutoff handling, and "Internal: Transfer Submission Procedure" for employee submission steps.
title: Transfer Types, Fees, and Limits
